key.name: five-hour-token-limit
key.description: Maximum tokens for the 5-hour billing block. Tokens = input + output + cache creation, optionally including cache reads (toggle "Count cache reads" in preferences).

key.name: weekly-token-limit
key.description: Maximum tokens for the last 7 calendar days. Tokens = input + output + cache creation, optionally including cache reads (toggle "Count cache reads" in preferences).

key.name: warning-percent
key.description: Progress bar turns orange when usage exceeds this percent.

key.name: danger-percent
key.description: Progress bar turns red when usage exceeds this percent.

key.name: count-cache-reads
key.description: If true, cache-read tokens are included in the 5h and weekly budget calculations alongside input, output, and cache-creation tokens. Default off because cache reads typically dominate totalTokens by 5x or more, making default budgets misleading.
